_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to holdout_corpora.json after each holdout is CONSTRUCTED. n_prompts must be >= 400 per instrument; bins must enumerate the 4 overlap stratification labels; sha256 is the SHA-256 of the sorted prompt list (run_bet0_phase1.py verifies it at load).
_workflow: construct the corpus first; compute the sha256 of the sorted prompt list; then add the entry here. once committed, the prompts are LOCKED — no add/remove/edit. boundary corruption of this principle invalidated the cross-vendor transport study earlier in the arc.
